transcript: Hi, this is Rocky from the Jeopardy! television office. How ya doin’, sir?
Good! Uh, Alex Trebek wanted me to contact you, uh, about appearing on the show. If I could put ya through to him, if you have just a moment, here, to speak to him…
Oh, you know what, uh, honestly, right now, I am in, uh, Louisiana at Tulane University about to go do a show.
He’d love to speak to ya just briefly. I’m… gonna put ya through to Alex right now.
Okay, look, I’ve gotta go do a show. This is probably a joke, I’m guessing—

Yeah. My phone rang. Somebody’s dickin’ around with the system. They’ve managed to come up with a, uh, process whereby they can phone two people at the same time and neither party knows what the hell’s goin’ on. So…—
Oh, I’m sure they’re having a great time right now.
Well, they are so brilliant! Um, anyway, well I hope you have a wonderful night.
I certainly will. And, uh, to cocksuckers who have, uh, engaged us, have a good laugh, children.
Yeah. Where are you? What, uh, what city—?
I’m at live— I’m—I’m— I live in LA but I’m actually about to do a show at Tulane University right now.
Yeah. New Orleans. Tulane, yeah. This is—
This is David Koechner. Um, is—is this Alex Trebek, for real?
Oh, yeah, so they’ve gotten ahold of your number and my number and so—
Oh, they’ve gotten ahold of a lot of peoples’ numbers. I got a call from, uh, José Canseco the other day. So, yeah, they—
They’ve figured a way to screw with the system.
Hopefully we’ll get them and beat the crap out of them, the sons of bitches.
And, well, that— I agree with you there. [laughs] Okay! You take care! Bye!—
[laughs] Thanks, brother. You too. Alright, bye.
